caption: The video appears to be a segment from a political discussion show titled "PLUS POLITICS," broadcasted on PlusTV. The screen is split into two sections: on the left, a male news anchor dressed in a suit and tie is seated in a studio with a backdrop featuring the show's logo and a world map. On the right, an older man wearing a red cap and patterned shirt is speaking, likely being interviewed or providing commentary. The text overlay at the bottom of the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU," indicating that the topic of discussion involves Bola Tinubu and his role in Nigerian politics. The video also includes information on where viewers can watch the show, such as on DSTV channel 408 and StarTimes channel 308, as well as an online link for live streaming.
